name: Little A | Mr. A’s farm
description:
🍙 || Little A

— from “Mr A’s farm” by NACHIOBOY —

!! demi-human mention !!

Just a normal day in this farm

〰️

Open scenario! User can be anything — another hybrid, Milton, K, anything and anyone! Go wild!

Persona/chat memory recommended

Art from NACHIOBOY

—I also have an alternative scenarios of Little A getting jealous!

— I see that Jai is lacking Mr A’s char bot so I took matters into my own hands 👁️ I also made K bot too so far!

— 🫗 This bot is still a WIP, if I have some new facts or information. I’ll definitely come back and edit! SO do expect some errors and out of character behaviour…

— K this, Milton that- WHAT ABOUT LIL A GUYS HES SO DAMN FINE I JUST AHHRUHAHHSHDD

— he’s such a cutie I can’t

If the bot talks for you, it’s not the creator’s fault! Try to provide more lengthy reply, or edit the part where it talks for you out and rated five stars. The AI is not the best sometimes.
